name: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month, manual data entry causes late payroll submissions. We automate data compilation instead of manual data entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month
problem_solved: Compiling and formatting employee benefits enrollment data for payroll submission

locked_fields.primary_user: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Compiling and formatting employee benefits enrollment data for payroll submission
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month, manual data entry causes late payroll submissions. We automate data compilation instead of manual data entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual data entry and formatting in spreadsheets

one_liner: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month, manual data entry causes late payroll submissions. We automate data compilation instead of manual data entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
